title: ApiScenariosBundleResponseV1
description: Response from POST /v1/scenarios/bundle — returns the created (or idempotent-matched) intent plus provisioned agent addresses.

intent_id.description: UUID of the created or matched intent.

status.description: Initial lifecycle status of the intent.

pending_with.description: Agent address or human contact currently holding the intent.

workflow_compile_id.description: ID of the compiled workflow run, if a workflow was compiled and started.

idempotent.description: True when an existing intent was returned rather than a new one created.

agents.description: Resolved agent addresses for each role specified in the bundle.

created.description: True when the service account was freshly created by this request.
